data.body: CHECKPOINT: All three done definitions are satisfied by existing tests in tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py::TestHypothesisValidationGate. DD1 (missing hypothesis_tests → reject) → test_hypothesis_gate_escalates_on_missing_hypothesis_tests. DD2 (all disproved → escalation) → test_hypothesis_gate_escalates_on_all_disproved. DD3 (confirmed → progression) → test_hypothesis_gate_proceeds_on_confirmed_verdict. All 12 tests in TestHypothesisValidationGate + TestRedBeforeFixGate + TestHardGatePreamble pass.
